table.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; font-size: 11px; font-family: verdana; vertical-align: top;

tr.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; font-size: 11px; font-family: verdana; vertical-align: top

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

a.title: The logical name of the element

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

a.title: Information about the use of the element

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

a.title: Minimum and Maximum # of times the element can appear in the instance

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px; width: 100px

a.title: Reference to the type of the element

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

a.title: Additional information about the element
Legend for this format

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck1.png)

a.title: EHDS refined base model for allergy/intolerance

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td:
Elements defined in Ancestors:header, presentedForm
Allergy intolerance model
Instances of this logical model can be the target of a Reference

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)

a.title: A specific allergen or other agent/substance (drug, food, chemical agent, etc.) to which the patient has an adverse reaction propensity.

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td:
Agent or allergen that causes the reaction
Binding Description: (preferred): 1.3.6.1.4.1.12559.11.10.1.3.1.42.24 eHDSIActiveIngredient (ATC, used in MH@EU); 1.3.6.1.4.1.12559.11.10.1.3.1.42.61 eHDSISubstance (EMA SMS, used in MH@EU); 1.3.6.1.4.1.12559.11.10.1.3.1.42.19 eHDSIAllergenNoDrug (SCT, used in MH@EU); ICD-11 Non-drug allergens

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)

a.title: Type of propensity describes whether this condition refers to an allergy, non-allergy intolerance, or unknown class of intolerance (not known to be allergy or intolerance)

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td:
Type of propensity describes whether this condition refers to an allergy, non-allergy intolerance, or unknown class of intolerance (not known to be allergy or intolerance)
Binding Description: (preferred): 1.3.6.1.4.1.12559.11.10.1.3.1.42.18 eHDSIAdverseEventType (SCT, used in MH@EU); http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/allergy-intolerance-type (HL7, required in HL7 FHIR)

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)

a.title: Textual description of the allergy or intolerance

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: Textual description of the allergy or intolerance

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)

a.title: Potential risk for future life-threatening adverse reactions when exposed to a substance known to cause an adverse reaction.

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td:
Potential risk for future life-threatening adverse reactions when exposed to a substance known to cause an adverse reaction.
Binding Description: (preferred): 1.3.6.1.4.1.12559.11.10.1.3.1.42.57 eHDSICriticality (HL7, used in MH@EU); http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/allergy-intolerance-criticality (HL7, required in HL7 FHIR)

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)

a.title: Assertion about the certainty associated with a propensity, or potential risk, of a reaction to the identified substance. Diagnostic and/or clinical evidence of condition.

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td:
Assertion about the certainty associated with a propensity, or potential risk, of a reaction to the identified substance. Diagnostic and/or clinical evidence of condition.
Binding Description: (preferred): 1.3.6.1.4.1.12559.11.10.1.3.1.42.58 eHDSIAllergyCertainty (HL7, used in MH@EU) ; http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/allergyintolerance-verification (HL7, required in HL7 FHIR)

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)

a.title: Clinical status of the allergy or intolerance (e.g. active, inactive, resolved)

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td:
Clinical status of the allergy or intolerance (e.g. active, inactive, resolved)
Binding Description: (preferred): 1.3.6.1.4.1.12559.11.10.1.3.1.42.59 eHDSIAllergyStatus (HL7, used in MH@EU); http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/allergyintolerance-clinical (HL7, required in HL7 FHIR)

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)

a.title: Date of onset of allergy, e.g., date of the first observation of the reaction. Partial date could be used.

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: Date of onset of allergy, e.g., date of the first observation of the reaction. Partial date could be used.

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)

a.title: Date of resolution of the allergy (e.g. when the clinician deemed there is no longer any need to track the underlying condition)

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: Date of resolution of the allergy (e.g. when the clinician deemed there is no longer any need to track the underlying condition)

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck01.png)

a.title: Description of the clinical manifestation of the allergic reaction including date of manifestation and severity. Example: anaphylactic shock, angioedema (the clinical manifestation also gives information about the severity of the observed reaction).

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: Description of the clinical manifestation of the allergic reaction including date of manifestation and severity. Example: anaphylactic shock, angioedema (the clinical manifestation also gives information about the severity of the observed reaction).

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck010.png)

a.title: Clinical symptoms/signs associated with the event

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td:
Clinical symptoms/signs associated with the event
Binding Description: (preferred): 1.3.6.1.4.1.12559.11.10.1.3.1.42.5 eHDSIIllnessandDisorder (ICD-10, alternative in MH@EU); 1.3.6.1.4.1.12559.11.10.1.3.1.42.11 eHDSIReactionAllergy (SCT, alternative in MH@EU); ICD-11

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck010.png)

a.title: Date and time of allergy manifestation

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: Date and time of allergy manifestation

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck010.png)

a.title: Severity of the clinical manifestation of the allergic reaction.

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td:
Severity of the clinical manifestation of the allergic reaction.
Binding Description: (preferred): 1.3.6.1.4.1.12559.11.10.1.3.1.42.13 eHDSISeverity (SCT, used in MH@EU); http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/reaction-event-severity (HL7, Required in HL7 FHIR)

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck010.png)

a.title: Description of the event as a whole

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: Description of the event as a whole

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck000.png)

a.title: Date of the observation of the reaction

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: Date of the observation of the reaction

a.title: Legend for this format

description.value: EHDS refined base model for allergy/intolerance

short.value: Allergy intolerance model

definition.value: EHDS refined base model for allergy/intolerance

short.value: Common header for all patient-related data

definition.value: Common header for all patient-related data
Patient/subject information

short.value: Business identifier for the object

definition.value: Business identifier for the object
Resource authoring details
Author(s) by whom the resource was/were authored. Multiple authors could be provided.

short.value: Date and time of authoring/issuing

definition.value: Date and time of the issuing the document/resource by its author.

short.value: Date and time of the last update to the resource

definition.value: Date and time of the last update to the document/information

short.value: Status of the resource

definition.value: Status of the resource

short.value: Reason for the current status of the resource.

definition.value: Reason for the current status of the resource.
Language in which the resource is written. Language is expressed by the IETF language tag.
Business version of the resource.

short.value: A narrative easy-to-read representation of the full data set, e.g. PDF-version of a document

definition.value: A narrative easy-to-read representation of the full data set, e.g. PDF-version of a document

short.value: Agent or allergen that causes the reaction

definition.value: A specific allergen or other agent/substance (drug, food, chemical agent, etc.) to which the patient has an adverse reaction propensity.

description.value: 1.3.6.1.4.1.12559.11.10.1.3.1.42.24 **eHDSIActiveIngredient** (ATC, used in MH@EU); 1.3.6.1.4.1.12559.11.10.1.3.1.42.61 eHDSISubstance (EMA SMS, used in MH@EU); 1.3.6.1.4.1.12559.11.10.1.3.1.42.19 eHDSIAllergenNoDrug (SCT, used in MH@EU); ICD-11 Non-drug allergens

short.value: Type of propensity describes whether this condition refers to an allergy, non-allergy intolerance, or unknown class of intolerance (not known to be allergy or intolerance)

definition.value: Type of propensity describes whether this condition refers to an allergy, non-allergy intolerance, or unknown class of intolerance (not known to be allergy or intolerance)

description.value: 1.3.6.1.4.1.12559.11.10.1.3.1.42.18 eHDSIAdverseEventType (SCT, used in MH@EU); http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/allergy-intolerance-type (HL7, required in HL7 FHIR)

short.value: Textual description of the allergy or intolerance

definition.value: Textual description of the allergy or intolerance

short.value: Potential risk for future life-threatening adverse reactions when exposed to a substance known to cause an adverse reaction.

definition.value: Potential risk for future life-threatening adverse reactions when exposed to a substance known to cause an adverse reaction.

description.value: 1.3.6.1.4.1.12559.11.10.1.3.1.42.57 eHDSICriticality (HL7, used in MH@EU); http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/allergy-intolerance-criticality (HL7, required in HL7 FHIR)

short.value: Assertion about the certainty associated with a propensity, or potential risk, of a reaction to the identified substance. Diagnostic and/or clinical evidence of condition.

definition.value: Assertion about the certainty associated with a propensity, or potential risk, of a reaction to the identified substance. Diagnostic and/or clinical evidence of condition.

description.value: 1.3.6.1.4.1.12559.11.10.1.3.1.42.58 eHDSIAllergyCertainty (HL7, used in MH@EU) ; http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/allergyintolerance-verification (HL7, required in HL7 FHIR)

short.value: Clinical status of the allergy or intolerance (e.g. active, inactive, resolved)

definition.value: Clinical status of the allergy or intolerance (e.g. active, inactive, resolved)

description.value: 1.3.6.1.4.1.12559.11.10.1.3.1.42.59 eHDSIAllergyStatus (HL7, used in MH@EU); http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/allergyintolerance-clinical (HL7, required in HL7 FHIR)

short.value: Date of onset of allergy, e.g., date of the first observation of the reaction. Partial date could be used.

definition.value: Date of onset of allergy, e.g., date of the first observation of the reaction. Partial date could be used.

short.value: Date of resolution of the allergy (e.g. when the clinician deemed there is no longer any need to track the underlying condition)

definition.value: Date of resolution of the allergy (e.g. when the clinician deemed there is no longer any need to track the underlying condition)

short.value: Description of the clinical manifestation of the allergic reaction including date of manifestation and severity. Example: anaphylactic shock, angioedema (the clinical manifestation also gives information about the severity of the observed reaction).

definition.value: Description of the clinical manifestation of the allergic reaction including date of manifestation and severity. Example: anaphylactic shock, angioedema (the clinical manifestation also gives information about the severity of the observed reaction).

short.value: Clinical symptoms/signs associated with the event

definition.value: Clinical symptoms/signs associated with the event

description.value: 1.3.6.1.4.1.12559.11.10.1.3.1.42.5 eHDSIIllnessandDisorder (ICD-10, alternative in MH@EU); 1.3.6.1.4.1.12559.11.10.1.3.1.42.11 eHDSIReactionAllergy (SCT, alternative in MH@EU); ICD-11

short.value: Date and time of allergy manifestation

definition.value: Date and time of allergy manifestation

short.value: Severity of the clinical manifestation of the allergic reaction.

definition.value: Severity of the clinical manifestation of the allergic reaction.

description.value: 1.3.6.1.4.1.12559.11.10.1.3.1.42.13 eHDSISeverity (SCT, used in MH@EU); http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/reaction-event-severity (HL7, Required in HL7 FHIR)

short.value: Description of the event as a whole

definition.value: Description of the event as a whole

short.value: Date of the observation of the reaction

definition.value: Date of the observation of the reaction

short.value: Allergy intolerance model

definition.value: EHDS refined base model for allergy/intolerance

short.value: Agent or allergen that causes the reaction

definition.value: A specific allergen or other agent/substance (drug, food, chemical agent, etc.) to which the patient has an adverse reaction propensity.

description.value: 1.3.6.1.4.1.12559.11.10.1.3.1.42.24 **eHDSIActiveIngredient** (ATC, used in MH@EU); 1.3.6.1.4.1.12559.11.10.1.3.1.42.61 eHDSISubstance (EMA SMS, used in MH@EU); 1.3.6.1.4.1.12559.11.10.1.3.1.42.19 eHDSIAllergenNoDrug (SCT, used in MH@EU); ICD-11 Non-drug allergens

short.value: Type of propensity describes whether this condition refers to an allergy, non-allergy intolerance, or unknown class of intolerance (not known to be allergy or intolerance)

definition.value: Type of propensity describes whether this condition refers to an allergy, non-allergy intolerance, or unknown class of intolerance (not known to be allergy or intolerance)

description.value: 1.3.6.1.4.1.12559.11.10.1.3.1.42.18 eHDSIAdverseEventType (SCT, used in MH@EU); http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/allergy-intolerance-type (HL7, required in HL7 FHIR)

short.value: Textual description of the allergy or intolerance

definition.value: Textual description of the allergy or intolerance

short.value: Potential risk for future life-threatening adverse reactions when exposed to a substance known to cause an adverse reaction.

definition.value: Potential risk for future life-threatening adverse reactions when exposed to a substance known to cause an adverse reaction.

description.value: 1.3.6.1.4.1.12559.11.10.1.3.1.42.57 eHDSICriticality (HL7, used in MH@EU); http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/allergy-intolerance-criticality (HL7, required in HL7 FHIR)

short.value: Assertion about the certainty associated with a propensity, or potential risk, of a reaction to the identified substance. Diagnostic and/or clinical evidence of condition.

definition.value: Assertion about the certainty associated with a propensity, or potential risk, of a reaction to the identified substance. Diagnostic and/or clinical evidence of condition.

description.value: 1.3.6.1.4.1.12559.11.10.1.3.1.42.58 eHDSIAllergyCertainty (HL7, used in MH@EU) ; http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/allergyintolerance-verification (HL7, required in HL7 FHIR)

short.value: Clinical status of the allergy or intolerance (e.g. active, inactive, resolved)

definition.value: Clinical status of the allergy or intolerance (e.g. active, inactive, resolved)

description.value: 1.3.6.1.4.1.12559.11.10.1.3.1.42.59 eHDSIAllergyStatus (HL7, used in MH@EU); http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/allergyintolerance-clinical (HL7, required in HL7 FHIR)

short.value: Date of onset of allergy, e.g., date of the first observation of the reaction. Partial date could be used.

definition.value: Date of onset of allergy, e.g., date of the first observation of the reaction. Partial date could be used.

short.value: Date of resolution of the allergy (e.g. when the clinician deemed there is no longer any need to track the underlying condition)

definition.value: Date of resolution of the allergy (e.g. when the clinician deemed there is no longer any need to track the underlying condition)

short.value: Description of the clinical manifestation of the allergic reaction including date of manifestation and severity. Example: anaphylactic shock, angioedema (the clinical manifestation also gives information about the severity of the observed reaction).

definition.value: Description of the clinical manifestation of the allergic reaction including date of manifestation and severity. Example: anaphylactic shock, angioedema (the clinical manifestation also gives information about the severity of the observed reaction).

short.value: Clinical symptoms/signs associated with the event

definition.value: Clinical symptoms/signs associated with the event

description.value: 1.3.6.1.4.1.12559.11.10.1.3.1.42.5 eHDSIIllnessandDisorder (ICD-10, alternative in MH@EU); 1.3.6.1.4.1.12559.11.10.1.3.1.42.11 eHDSIReactionAllergy (SCT, alternative in MH@EU); ICD-11

short.value: Date and time of allergy manifestation

definition.value: Date and time of allergy manifestation

short.value: Severity of the clinical manifestation of the allergic reaction.

definition.value: Severity of the clinical manifestation of the allergic reaction.

description.value: 1.3.6.1.4.1.12559.11.10.1.3.1.42.13 eHDSISeverity (SCT, used in MH@EU); http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/reaction-event-severity (HL7, Required in HL7 FHIR)

short.value: Description of the event as a whole

definition.value: Description of the event as a whole

short.value: Date of the observation of the reaction

definition.value: Date of the observation of the reaction
